overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist riding a mechanical mount through a snowy mountainous landscape. The character traverses snow-covered ridges, shallow rivers, and cliffside paths in a bright winter setting with mixed pine and autumn forests.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge with scattered pines

events.description: descending from open ridge into denser pine forest

agents.ego_description: riding mechanical mount downhill through snow-covered terrain

entered.detail: tall snow-capped mountain peaks with mist in the valleys
dense evergreen trees covered in snow
steep rocky outcrops dusted with snow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain ridge with panoramic views of distant peaks. The rider descends through scattered pine trees into a denser forest section, navigating between rocky outcrops on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow mountain river with autumn foliage

events.description: mechanical mount enters shallow water, changing gait to wading
surrounding vegetation shifts from snow-covered pines to autumn-colored trees

agents.ego_description: riding through clear shallow river water surrounded by autumn forest

entered.detail: clear flowing water with visible rocky bottom
trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage
stones and pebbles visible beneath the water surface

segments.scene_description: The mount enters a shallow river, wading through crystal-clear water. The snowy peaks recede as the rider follows the winding stream, transitioning from winter pines to vibrant autumn foliage on the banks.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed snow and autumn forest with objective markers

events.description: exiting river back onto snow-covered forest path
green floating waypoint markers appear in the distance

agents.ego_description: riding through mixed terrain transitioning between water and snow

entered.detail: glowing green objective markers floating above the path
large rocks covered in snow lining the trail

segments.scene_description: Exiting the river, the rider traverses a mixed forest where snow meets autumn foliage. Green waypoint markers appear ahead, guiding the path forward as the terrain becomes rockier with large snow-dusted boulders.

events.description: emerging from forest onto narrow cliffside path with lake view
navigating tight rocky passage along cliff edge

agents.ego_description: riding along narrow cliff edge with steep drop to water below

entered.detail: turquoise alpine lake visible in the valley below
misty waterfall cascading down the distant mountainside

segments.scene_description: The path opens to a dramatic cliffside overlooking a turquoise mountain lake. The rider navigates narrow rocky passages with steep drops on the right and cliff walls on the left, passing snow-covered boulders and glimpsing a distant waterfall before the trail continues through mixed forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a high, snowy mountain ridge down into a vibrant valley of mixed forests and turquoise waters. It begins with a descent from panoramic peaks through scattered pine trees and rocky outcrops, moving deeper into a dense woodland. As the rider enters a shallow, crystal-clear river, the snowy vistas recede and the landscape shifts from winter pines to banks of vibrant autumn foliage. The scene then transitions out of the water and through a mixed forest of snow and gold, guided by green waypoint markers across a terrain of large, snow-dusted boulders. Finally, the path opens onto a dramatic cliffside overlooking a turquoise mountain lake, navigating narrow rocky passages and steep drops past a distant waterfall before returning into the mixed forest.
